payload.label: side table
payload.short_description: dark reddish wood side table edge-crop
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped view of a dark reddish-brown varnished wooden side table with decorative moulding, one visible drawer above a cabinet door, round dark metal knobs, a plinth base and glossy finish; appears close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m away) and shows slight surface wear near edges.
